# Notices

This repository contains a fork of `irondash_run_loop` from the
[`irondash`](https://github.com/irondash/irondash) project.

- Upstream path: `irondash/run_loop`
- Upstream repository: <https://github.com/irondash/irondash>
- Upstream license: MIT

The original MIT license text and copyright notice are preserved in
[LICENSE](./LICENSE).

NovoNotes-specific changes in this fork include:

- DLL/plugin-oriented safety adjustments
- explicit task abort handling
- panic capture and reporting improvements
- additional tests and benchmarks
